tasks.title: Project & package scaffold: Xcode project, CrosswireKit SPM package, all target memberships, bundle id, signing
acceptance_criteria: Project builds with zero source files and all five package targets plus app/UI test targets present
Every lane's designated source directories exist and are attached to the correct target
Bundle id and signing config are set so the app runs on a simulator with no manual Xcode edits

tasks.title: CrosswireModels: all shared Codable structs/enums per frozen interfaces-json
acceptance_criteria: Every type matches the tech_specs interfaces-json signature exactly
Module imports only Foundation, zero SwiftUI/MultipeerConnectivity
Clue board type is [Clue] ordered array, never a dictionary

tasks.title: FragmentDealer: deterministic sessionID-seeded dealing (locked decision, not a lookup ambiguity)
acceptance_criteria: dealFragments(pack:playerCount:) is a pure function of pack + playerCount + seed
Same seed always produces the same assignment; different sessionIDs produce different assignments
Seed is injectable so unit tests are fully deterministic

tasks.title: Clue token validation and TokenComposer vocabulary enforcement
acceptance_criteria: validateClue(tokens:against:) rejects any token not owned by the given fragment
Function is pure and synchronous, no I/O

tasks.title: Solvability checker (evaluateSolvability)
acceptance_criteria: evaluateSolvability(pack:playerCount:) returns true only if the solution's requiredFactIDs are fully covered by the union of dealt fragments at that player count
Runs for any player count 6...12 without crashing on malformed input

tasks.title: Solution proposal state machine (fresh id/tally per propose, decline discards)
acceptance_criteria: A decline discards the proposal entirely; the next propose creates a new UUID and empty tally
resolveProposal only returns confirmed once every roster entry's tally is confirmed (full-confirm, no majority path)

tasks.title: CrosswireRulesEngine unit tests against MockGameTransport fixtures
acceptance_criteria: All rules engine logic is covered with zero import of SwiftUI or MultipeerConnectivity
Tests are deterministic across repeated CI runs (fixed seeds)

tasks.title: Author scenario pack content: one full pack with fragmentSets for player counts 6-12
acceptance_criteria: Pack includes premise, centralQuestion, solution key, allowedTokenVocabulary, and a fragmentSets entry for every player count 6 through 12
isFree is true for this pack (guest-never-gated requirement)

tasks.title: Automated solvability validation gate across player counts 6-12 for every bundled pack
acceptance_criteria: Test fails the build if any bundled pack is not solvable at any of the 7 player counts 6...12
If the first-draft pack fails at low counts, task is reopened for content redesign (redundant/overlapping fragments) rather than silently skipped

tasks.title: GameTransport protocol, PeerID, GameMessage, TransportEvent, MockGameTransport
acceptance_criteria: MockGameTransport can simulate N peers with configurable latency range and drop rate, and can trigger a reconnect event on command
GameTransport is the only type any other module needs to depend on for transport behavior

tasks.title: MultipeerGameTransport (real MC wrapper) + send-failure policy: retry once, then feed peer into peerReconnecting
acceptance_criteria: All MCSessionDelegate/advertiser/browser callbacks hop to the main actor before emitting a TransportEvent
A send/broadcast throw triggers exactly one immediate retry; a second failure emits peerReconnecting for that peer, never a new UI state
NSBonjourServices string in Info.plist matches the advertised/browsed service type exactly

tasks.title: RoundSnapshotWriter actor: atomic writes, coalescing, flush on phase transition and backgrounding
acceptance_criteria: Writes use Data.write(.atomic); rapid state changes coalesce to roughly one write per couple seconds
save/loadIfRestorable/delete never block the main actor; loadIfRestorable applies the phase-non-terminal-AND-within-grace-window rule and silently deletes anything else

tasks.title: ScenarioPackLoader: bundled versioned JSON loading
acceptance_criteria: Loads all bundled packs from CrosswireKit/Resources/ScenarioPacks
Mismatched schemaVersion fails loudly in debug builds rather than silently misparsing

tasks.title: SettingsStore: UserDefaults wrapper for display name and settings
acceptance_criteria: displayName persists across launches and is never defaulted from the device name
hasSeenRFTip flag persists and is readable before first Home screen render

tasks.title: PurchaseManager: StoreKit 2 async product/entitlement/restore wrapper
acceptance_criteria: products(), currentEntitlements(), restore() all use StoreKit 2 async APIs with no backend call
Entitlement check works fully offline via Transaction.currentEntitlements

tasks.title: Transport + persistence unit tests: N-peer/latency/drop/reconnect, stale-snapshot discard, interrupted atomic write
acceptance_criteria: A snapshot past the grace window or already-terminal is proven to be silently discarded, never surfaced
A simulated interrupted write does not leave a corrupt/partial file on disk

tasks.title: AppRootCoordinator + AppRoute pre-session NavigationStack, restoreIfEligible wiring
acceptance_criteria: On launch, restoreIfEligible is called before any onboarding UI renders
Mission start replaces the navigation root wholesale (never pushes) so back-swipe cannot leave an active round

tasks.title: Pre-session screens: NameEntry, Home/Discovery, PermissionPrimer, PackPicker, Lobby, LateJoinBlocked, Settings
acceptance_criteria: Every screen has explicit empty/loading/success/error states where reachable, per the design_handoff spec
Local-network-permission-denied is a distinct visual state from the empty 'no sessions found' state
Lobby's Start button is disabled below 6 players with the reason stated inline

tasks.title: MissionViewModel: sole owner of active-round state, transport event handling, send-failure policy
acceptance_criteria: Single @Observable @MainActor instance per device; no sheet or view holds a duplicate copy of round state
handle(_:) implements the locked retry-once-then-peerReconnecting policy for send failures

tasks.title: Mission canvas: board with scroll-preserving + new-clue indicator, FragmentTray, TokenComposer (partial-detent sheets)
acceptance_criteria: A new clue arriving while scrolled away from bottom shows a tap-to-jump indicator instead of forcing auto-scroll
TokenComposer can only construct clues from the local player's own fragment facts, never free text
Fragment reveal is a labeled accessible toggle, not a bare gesture

tasks.title: Solution Confirm overlay: propose/confirm/decline with three-state tally
acceptance_criteria: Tally visibly distinguishes pending/confirmed/declined per player
A decline returns everyone to the board and a fresh propose starts a new tally, never reusing the old one

tasks.title: Briefing, Resolution beat, Debrief/Reveal, Replay screens
acceptance_criteria: Debrief shows every player's original fragment side-by-side with a deliberate, explicit VoiceOver reading order (not default grid traversal)
Win and loss share identical structural layout, differing only in outcome banner/tone

tasks.title: XCUITest coverage for single-device deterministic flows
acceptance_criteria: Empty, loading, and permission-denied states are each exercised by a distinct test, not inferred from success-state tests

tasks.title: ResilienceBanner component family + ResilienceState model wiring
acceptance_criteria: One component renders all four variants (reconnecting/compromised/hostDisconnected/restoringMission) parameterized by severity
Severity is conveyed in the accessibility label text, never by color alone

tasks.title: AppLifecycleObserver: idle-timer suspension, background auto-hide, flush-write on backgrounding
acceptance_criteria: isIdleTimerDisabled is true only for the duration of an active session and restored after
An immediate background/foreground cycle mid-round blurs the fragment before the OS finishes its transition animation

tasks.title: Accessibility audit pass across all screens (VoiceOver, Dynamic Type reflow, Reduce Motion tokens)
files: Crosswire/Features/**/*.swift (accessibility modifiers only, no layout/logic changes)
acceptance_criteria: Dynamic Type causes reflow (vertical re-stack) on every clue/fragment card, never truncation
Reduce Motion replaces every decorative animation (pin-drop, connecting lines, staggered debrief fade) with an instant or discrete equivalent

tasks.title: Full-round MockGameTransport integration test: deal to relaunch-restore, gates UI-integration sign-off
acceptance_criteria: Single test exercises deal -> clue exchange -> propose -> decline -> reconfirm -> resolve -> snapshot write -> simulated relaunch -> restore against MockGameTransport
Test must pass before any polish_resilience or remaining primary_ui screen task is considered mergeable to main

tasks.title: Device/simulator verification pass with an honest statement of tested scale
acceptance_criteria: States explicitly how many physical devices vs. simulator-to-simulator pairs were actually used
Never implies 10-12-simultaneous-peer coverage that was not actually exercised

tasks.title: StoreKit paywall wiring + free/locked pack-picker honesty enforcement
acceptance_criteria: A guest joining someone else's session never encounters a paywall anywhere in their flow
Locked packs are visibly and honestly labeled as not-yet-available, never fake-unlockable
